# Primary sources

Recheck these primary sources during every execution before relying on exact locations,
flags, versions, or client behavior. Record each source's access date and the decision it
informed in the design and completion records. If network access is unavailable, identify
the unverified claims rather than carrying forward an earlier review date.

## Open skill format and authoring

- Agent Skills specification: https://agentskills.io/specification
- Agent Skills best practices: https://agentskills.io/skill-creation/best-practices
- Agent Skills description optimization: https://agentskills.io/skill-creation/optimizing-descriptions
- Agent Skills quickstart: https://agentskills.io/skill-creation/quickstart
- Anthropic skill-creator reference: https://github.com/anthropics/skills/blob/main/skills/skill-creator/SKILL.md
- OpenAI Codex skill authoring: https://developers.openai.com/codex/build-skills
- OpenAI Codex best practices: https://developers.openai.com/codex/learn/best-practices
- OpenAI skill eval methodology: https://developers.openai.com/blog/eval-skills

## Supported clients and distribution

- Claude Code skills: https://code.claude.com/docs/en/skills
- Claude Code plugins: https://code.claude.com/docs/en/plugins
- Claude Code plugin reference: https://code.claude.com/docs/en/plugins-reference
- Codex build skills: https://developers.openai.com/codex/build-skills
- Codex build plugins: https://developers.openai.com/codex/build-plugins
- OpenCode Agent Skills: https://opencode.ai/docs/skills/
- GitHub CLI skill installation: https://cli.github.com/manual/gh_skill_install
- GitHub CLI skill publishing and validation: https://cli.github.com/manual/gh_skill_publish

## Repository authorities

These checked-in paths define the local contract and must be inspected from the active
checkout rather than assumed from this source list:

- `AGENTS.md`
- `CONTRIBUTING.md`
- `docs/architecture.md`
- `docs/authoring.md`
- `docs/evals.md`
- `docs/threat-model.md`
- `schemas/skillpack.schema.json`
- `schemas/evals.schema.json`
- `templates/skill/`
- `src/skillpack_tools/`
- `tests/`
